note: Seeded from warm runs on main HEAD (release 0.2.5) on a Blackhole P300 card. Protocol: scripts/perf_regression.py --model <m>; fold models fold examples/trpcage.yaml (20 aa, single-sequence) at 1 recycling cycle / 10 sampling steps / 1 diffusion sample; esmc-600m embeds 8x ubiquitin (76 aa) at batch 8. Each model: load once in-process, 2 warmup folds (absorb first-kernel compile, excluded), 5 timed folds, report median throughput. Model load + first-compile are excluded — this is a warm dispatch/throughput number, not a cold-start or production fold. It catches kernel/dispatch regressions; accuracy is scripts/release_gate.py's job. Update a baseline only via --update-baseline --note "<why this perf change is intended>"; never silently.
